name: YoloX - Crosshair Overlay
short_description: Always-visible crosshair overlay for FPS games. Dynamic color inversion, zoom, audio cues, motion reaction, anti-cheat safety with GameBar, and dedicated fullscreen.
detailed_description:
YoloX is an always-visible crosshair overlay built for FPS games. From dynamic visibility to reactive feedback and smooth fullscreen overlays, YoloX keeps your crosshair readable, reliable, and anti-cheat safe — without unsafe hooks.

Always-Visible Crosshair

Automatically inverts color against the game so your crosshair stays visible over any background.

Zoom

Add scope-style zoom to any weapon — even a knife!

Audio Sensor

Visual reactions to game audio. Listen to music without missing important cues like shots or footsteps.

Features

  • Always-Visible: Dynamic color inversion ensures consistent crosshair visibility.
  • Anti-Cheat Safety: GameBar support, whitelisting, code signing, overlay only (no dangerous hooks).
  • Fullscreen: Works in dedicated fullscreen.
  • Fast & Lightweight: Highly optimized. No lag. No FPS drops.
  • Profiles: Per-game crosshair, size, offset, and hotkeys.
  • Audio Sensor: Visual reactions to game audio like shots or footsteps.
  • Motion Sensor: Visual reactions to mouse activity or movement.
  • Animations: Separate animations for main fire, alt fire, jump, and more.
  • Variety: Includes many crosshairs and more by community users, pros, and streamers.
  • Publish: Publish to the community and share with friends.
  • Hotkeys: Switch crosshairs, scale, offset, toggle visibility, or zoom power.
  • Settings: Settings to autohide, autostart, desync from Steam (hide playing status), and more.
  • Input: XBox controller support.

Crosshair Creation Features

Design simple or advanced crosshairs with full creative control.
  • Layers: Multiple layers allowing complex designs.
  • Shapes: Use included vector shapes or add your own images.
  • Patterns: Single, dual, T, or + patterns.
  • Blending and Effects: Inverted, zoom, blur, and more.
  • Actions: Separate animations by main fire, alt fire, and idle.
  • Animation: Full keyframe animation with tweenable properties like position, rotation, color, and images.
  • Audio and Motion: Customize crosshair response to audio and motion.
  • Any crosshair is possible!

Getting Started

Open your game and press CTRL+SHIFT+P to assign a crosshair. Repeat to assign other crosshairs. For the full menu, click the pink X taskbar icon.

Notes

  • Effects: Inverted color, zoom, audio, and motion effects are crosshair-specific and depend on the crosshair design. Included crosshairs demonstrate all features.
  • Anti-Cheat Safety: YoloX operates like other widely accepted game overlays and includes multiple safety and compliance measures. It is routinely tested with major FPS titles. Always verify compatibility with a specific game’s ToS before use.
  • Dedicated Fullscreen: When not using Game Bar, this may require enabling the NVIDIA setting: Vulkan/OpenGL Present Method: prefer DXGI swapchain

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Vietnamese
